_comment: Spirit Vein Ore — the physical manifestation of a minor spirit vein underground. Canon (CANON_RI_ECOLOGY.md 2.2, Type C conf 3): ~200-400 minor spirit veins across Planet Suzaku. Vanilla stand-in: nether_quartz_ore (mineral-looking, common enough for hundreds of placements). When custom blocks are added, this will become spirit_stone_ore (glowing, emits light 15). Prime Directive: the spirit vein exists objectively; only cultivators can perceive its Qi.
